items.title: Visitors are up, but Mona remains reliant on gambling funds

children.content: Newly filed accounts give a first glimpse of Mona's ultimate holding company, showing the loss-making gallery remains heavily reliant on gambling funds.

items.title: Doctor's 'grossly irresponsible' prescribing played role in two deaths, coroner finds

children.content: A coroner has found a doctor's prescription of drugs to two drug-dependent patients had a "direct causative role" in their deaths. Their report says the doctor had a "permissive approach to opioid prescribing" for more than two decades.

image.altText: Close-up photo of a silver and white stethoscope. Dec 2022.

items.title: Melbourne Storm boss hails 'positive' talks with Tasmania to bring games south

children.content: Melbourne Storm chief executive Justin Rodski says he's "got no doubt" a deal with Tasmania can be reached if the commercial interests line up, following a round of courting from premier Jeremy Rockliff.

image.altText: Cameron Munster of the Storm looks to pass the ball

items.title: Ogilvie's portfolios redistributed following resignation from Tasmanian cabinet

children.content: The premier says there will be $1 million in savings from not appointing another minister and instead redistributing Madeleine Ogilvie's portfolios within cabinet.

gallery.altText: A blonde politician at a press conference.

thumbnail.altText: A blonde politician at a press conference.

items.title: Tugboat? Pipeline? Why there's no quick fuel fix for the Nuyina

children.content: Australia's Antarctic icebreaker can't access the marine fuel depot near its home port in Hobart. It currently makes a 674 kilometre detour to Burnie, but are there other options?

image.altText: Front on view of an icebreaker ship.

items.title: Women say getting a long-acting reversible contraceptive has been the 'best decision'

children.content: Misinformation, cost and a lack of trained providers have stopped many Australian women from accessing what doctors consider the most effective form of reversible contraception.

image.altText: Young women leans on her kitchen bench, posing for photo

items.title: TassieCast 🔊 Boag’s calls last drinks in Launceston

children.content: Northern Tasmania has been rocked with the news that after 145 years — James Boag beer will no longer be produced in Launceston.

gallery.altText: a red brick building with grey skies and green signage

thumbnail.altText: a red brick building with grey skies and green signage

items.title: Government accused of misleading public on NDIS cuts

children.content: The federal government has been accused of selling its cuts to the National Disability Insurance Scheme (NDIS) as a crackdown on fraud, while instead pursuing billions of dollars of dramatic savings by slashing participant packages.

gallery.altText: Jenny mcalliser appearing at Estimates Committee

thumbnail.altText: Jenny mcalliser appearing at Estimates Committee

items.title: Daughter says parents' rural home stabbing 'deeply traumatising'

children.content: The daughter of a couple who suffered critical stab wounds during a suspected home invasion on a remote property said the family is traumatised by the incident.

image.altText: Two women

items.title: Kumanjayi Little Baby's family were forced to leave home community, MP says

children.content: Member for Lingiari Marion Scrymgour says the mother of Kumanjayi Little Baby had been living in insecure housing in Alice Springs so she could access specialist support for her daughter, before the five-year-old's tragic death in April.

image.altText: Two women sit opposite each other.

items.title: This is where Israel's military crossed Lebanon's Litani River

children.content: Images of the first tanks to roll over Lebanon's Litani River were posted online this week. ABC NEWS Verify has found the spot where Israel's military crossed.

articles.title: Hezbollah rejects Lebanon ceasefire as Israeli strikes kill four

children.content: Iran has made a ceasefire in Lebanon a condition for any peace deal with Washington, and has suggested in recent days that it could intervene directly if Israel keeps up attacks there.

items.title: Emissions drop again, fuelling hopes Australia's hit a tipping point

children.content: Emissions are at their lowest point since the COVID pandemic shut down the economy, dropping 2.1 per cent over the year to December 2025.

items.title: Prolific character actor stabbed to death in front yard at age 81

children.content: James Handy appeared in almost 150 films or TV series, according to his IMDb page, with his last role being a bartender in Top Gun: Maverick.

image.altText: A middle-aged man with grey hair speaks while wearing a suit.

items.title: Mary Fowler has crossed the threshold from athlete to cultural icon

children.content: Matildas star Mary Fowler is using her platform to share what matters to her, as she navigates becoming a truly global footballing superstar.

items.title: Dorothy the kitten who survived the unthinkable reunited with its rescuer

children.content: A kitten left for dead after being thrown from a moving car has spent months recovering and is now at a new home with two familiar faces.

image.altText: A grey kitten with yellow eyes, lying ina  bed, with a bandage around one of its legs.

items.title: Need a mood boost? Here's why gardening might be worth a try

children.content: While gardening alone is not a treatment for mental illness, a growing body of evidence links it with higher levels of mental wellbeing and life satisfaction.

image.altText: Hands tending to a plant in a pot.

children.content: The Princess of Wales joined in a hospital cancer ward celebration for a young mum who completed chemotherapy.

items.title: Looking for another show like Off Campus? Right this way

children.content: Hannah and Garrett's steamy love story might be on ice, but we've found more romance and yearning to tick your comfort-viewing boxes.

image.altText: Two people smiling at each other while sitting on a bus.

items.title: Court system 'in a shambles' after transcription service goes bust

children.content: There are fears mass redundancies at Australia's main transcription service could leave court cases around the country in limbo after it was revealed VIQ Solutions would be wound down.

image.altText: Building exterior with Australian emblem, signage

items.title: 'ISIS bride' charged with slavery poses risk if granted bail, court hears

children.content: Zeinab Ahmad, who recently returned to Australia, is seeking bail after she was charged with slavery offences after allegedly crossing into Syria with her family in 2015.

image.altText: A court sketch of Zeinab Ahmad

items.title: Doctor in tears over 'atypical' moles as social media craze causes concern

children.content: Skin specialists are sounding a warning about the potential cancer risks associated with unregulated peptides at the heart of a social media-driven beauty craze.

image.altText: Large moles on a young person's back.

items.title: Sex discrimination commissioner slams gender definition proposal

children.content: Australia's sex discrimination commissioner condemns a proposal to reinstate biological definition of sexes as a "step back" for women.

image.altText: Politician speaks in Canberra with Nationals leader in background.

items.title: Rumours, rifts and a reported resignation form a murky picture of a war-ravaged Iran

children.content: A report about the resignation of Iran's president earlier this week came at a turbulent moment for Iran's regime, which is grappling with frictions between moderates and hardliners as the war drags on.

gallery.altText: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian delivers a speech.

thumbnail.altText: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian delivers a speech.

items.title: Iranian-French cartoonist Marjane Satrapi, author of Persepolis, dead at 56

children.content: A committed advocate to furthering free speech and women's rights in her birth country, Satrapi lost her husband, Swedish actor Mattias Ripa, in April last year, and "died of sadness", according to French media.

image.altText: A middle-aged woman with dark hair smiles as she stands in front of a film-reel-themed backdrop.

items.title: The race against time to contain Ebola

children.content: Tensions are running high as officials fight to stop the rapid spread of Ebola in the Democratic Republic of Congo, where aid workers tell the ABC they are already playing catch-up with the deadly disease.

image.altText: A baby held by its mother who wears a face mask reaches towards the camera.

items.title: Biggest universal magnetic map unlocks new chapter of space research

children.content: Data gathered by scientists at the Square Kilometre Array has resulted in a new "map" detailing the magnetic web of our observable universe.

items.title: Zelenskyy writes open letter inviting Putin to talks to end Ukraine war

children.content: An open letter is the first public message Mr Zelenskyy has written directly to Mr Putin since Russia launched its full-scale invasion in 2022.

image.altText: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskiy speaks behind a lectern

items.title: Portugal and Austria defeat Germany for UN Security Council seats

children.content: Portugal and Austria have defeated Germany for seats on the powerful but deeply divided UN Security Council in a hotly contested race after intense campaigning.

image.altText: The symbol of the United Nations - a world map and olive branches - is displayed on the side of high-rise building.

items.title: Ancient tribes, military, trade and China's rise meet on this island

children.content: India's Great Nicobar Island is home to one of the world's last isolated tribes who are believed to have lived there for thousands of years, but a rising China is set to see it undergo a major transformation at the Indian government's insistence.

items.title: Viral Kiwi star meets Argentine influencer who boosted following to 5M

children.content: New Zealand soccer player Tim Payne has met social media influencer Valen Scarsini after the Argentine encouraged his fans to follow the unheralded All Whites player.

items.title: Olympic cash debate swirls ahead of swimming trials

children.content: Australian swimmer Shayna Jack has added her voice to growing calls for Olympic prize money, believing athletes are missing out on what they financially deserve.

image.altText: Swimmer finishes a race, goggles on forehead, looking at her time

items.title: Canberra man facing almost 70 sexual assault, violence charges

children.content: Police said multiple women contacted them in late 2025 and early 2026 to accuse the man of sexual assault while he was in relationships with them.

image.altText: A man with his hands cuffed behind his back is led away by a police officer.

items.title: What to know about the New World screwworm fly and its reappearance in the US

children.content: The New World screwworm fly is threatening the $US113 billion United States cattle industry for the first time in more than a half century.

image.altText: A Screwworm fly sits on a branch. It has orange eyes and a metallic blue/green body.

items.title: Experts suspect state policy is putting some farmers in artificial drought

children.content: A western New South Wales farmer says dams built next door have stopped all water flows onto his property, forcing him to graze and water his stock by the side of the road.

articles.title: Farmers are increasingly embracing change, and it's bringing them hope

children.content: When grazier Matthew Peart took over his family's organic beef operation almost 20 years ago, his pastures were rundown, and the future looked bleak. But now, he's unashamedly optimistic, and a new report suggests he's not alone.

image.altText: Mid  shot from behind of farmer leaning backwards against the front of a ute looking out to a sunset

articles.title: Hot spot for Australian bull semen as China market reopens

children.content: After a five year break, livestock farmers in China will use Australian genetics to produce premium beef for traditional dining and hot pot markets.

image.altText: Photo of vials of frozen bull semen.
